subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou in Whose hand lie the reins of all creation and in Whose grasp are held the destinies of all existing things! I beseech Thee by the Revealer of verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من بیدک زمام الکائنات و فی قبضتک ازمه الموجودات اسئلک بمنزل الایات
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for women
